raw_consumer_statement:
Dear Citi AAdvantage Dispute Resolution Team, I am submitting a formal escalation regarding the mishandling and incorrect resolution of my dispute, Case ID : XXXX, in the amount of {$340.00}, dated XX/XX/XXXX. 

This dispute involves a purchase made through XXXX, which was returned within the stated return period. Despite complying fully with the return policy, I have not received a refund. 

After contacting XXXX, I was informed that they attempted to reach the third-party merchant to confirm receipt of the returned item but were unable to make contact. XXXX advised me to initiate a dispute with Citi and confirmed that a notation regarding this issue would be documented under XXXX Customer Reference Number : XXXX. 

I subsequently filed a dispute with Citi and provided clear supporting documentation, including proof of return and delivery confirmation : - Tracking Number : XXXX, which confirms that the returned merchandise was successfully delivered to the merchant. 

Despite this verifiable evidence, I received notice dated XX/XX/XXXX, stating that Citi had completed its investigation and ruled in favor of the merchant, with the claim that the merchandise remains in my possession. This conclusion is factually incorrect and unsupported by the documentation I submitted. 

This outcome reflects a failure to properly review the evidence and raises serious concerns regarding the diligence and accuracy of the investigation conducted by the assigned claims associate. 

I am formally requesting the following : 1. Immediate escalation of this matter to a Senior Dispute Manager or Executive Review Team.

2. A comprehensive re-evaluation of all submitted documentation, including confirmed delivery of the returned item.

3. Reversal of the prior decision and issuance of a full credit of {$340.00}.

4. A written explanation detailing how the initial determination was made despite clear proof of return. 

This situation is both unfair and unacceptable, and I expect a prompt correction based on the documented facts. Please confirm receipt of this escalation and provide a timeline for resolution. 

Sincerely, XXXX XXXX XXXX
